problem: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations?
mechanism: Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type
hypothesis: The key to How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations? is Stem cell differentiation into target tissue type — specifically Stem cell differentiation — which would help 500,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 10 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
